news_items.headline: A home run robber robbed of a home run!
Arrighetti Locks Down Rangers, Astros Take Series with 5-1 Win
news_items.summary: The Astros best starter this season has been a guy not deemed good enough to make the Opening Day roster. Spencer Arrighetti (W, 7-1) picked up his 7th win in 8 starts with another terrific performance, limiting the Texas Rangers (25-31) to one run over 6 innings as the Houston Astros (26-32) took 3 of […]
